new_example: The new safety regulations are designed to minimize workplace accidents today.
new_translation: Các quy định an toàn mới nhằm giảm thiểu tai nạn lao động.

old_example: The company aims to keep operational costs to a professional minimum while maintaining high international safety standards.
new_example: The company aims to keep operational costs to a minimum today.
new_translation: Công ty đặt mục tiêu giữ chi phí vận hành ở mức tối thiểu.

old_example: He used a portable miniprojector to share his presentation with the clients in the small meeting room.
new_example: He used a portable miniprojector to share his presentation today.
new_translation: Anh ấy đã sử dụng một chiếc máy chiếu mini cầm tay hôm nay.

old_example: The international trade minister is scheduled to visit the regional headquarters to discuss new global economic growth.
new_example: The international trade minister will visit the regional headquarters today.
new_translation: Bộ trưởng thương mại quốc tế sẽ đến thăm trụ sở khu vực.

old_example: The technical team identified several minor bugs in the international software application that were easily rectified yesterday.
new_example: The team identified several minor bugs in the software application yesterday.
new_translation: Đội kỹ thuật xác định vài lỗi nhỏ trong ứng dụng phần mềm hôm qua.

old_example: The aircraft had to return to the airport due to a minor technical issue that was quickly resolved.
new_example: The aircraft returned to the airport due to a minor technical issue.
new_translation: Máy bay đã phải quay lại sân bay do một vấn đề kỹ thuật nhỏ.

old_example: The company's new international technology products are in mint condition, ready for the grand global launch event.
new_example: The company's new products are in mint condition today.
new_translation: Các sản phẩm mới của công ty ở trong tình trạng mới tinh hôm nay.

old_example: The company's international sales revenue for the last quarter was minus five percent due to the recession.
new_example: The company's international sales revenue for last quarter was minus five percent.
new_translation: Doanh thu bán hàng quốc tế của công ty quý qua đã giảm 5%.

old_example: The final price for the item will be the listed price minus the ten percent loyalty discount.
new_example: The price will be the listed price minus the discount today.
new_translation: Giá sẽ là giá niêm yết trừ đi khoản giảm giá hôm nay.

old_example: The auditor identified several minute errors in the international marketing and sales report that were easily rectified.
new_example: The auditor identified several minute errors in the report today.
new_translation: Kiểm toán viên xác định vài lỗi nhỏ trong báo cáo hôm nay.

old_example: The international flight is scheduled to depart in exactly fifteen minutes from the city airport terminal tomorrow.
new_example: The international flight will depart in fifteen minutes today.
new_translation: Chuyến bay quốc tế sẽ khởi hành trong mười lăm phút nữa hôm nay.

old_example: The secretary is responsible for taking the minutes and distributing them to all attendees after the session.
new_example: The secretary is responsible for taking the minutes today.
new_translation: Thư ký chịu trách nhiệm ghi biên bản hôm nay.

old_example: Mira has been selected to represent the firm at the upcoming international technology symposium in Tokyo.
new_example: Mira has been selected to represent the firm in Tokyo today.
new_translation: Mira đã được chọn để đại diện cho công ty tại Tokyo hôm nay.

old_example: The company's recent success mirrors the overall growth trend in the renewable energy sector.
new_example: The company's recent success mirrors the growth in the energy sector today.
new_translation: Thành công của công ty phản ánh sự tăng trưởng ngành năng lượng.

old_example: The students were warned that if they continued to misbehave during the field trip, they would be sent back to school immediately.
new_example: The students were warned not to misbehave during the trip today.
new_translation: Các học sinh đã bị cảnh báo không được cư xử tệ trong chuyến đi.

old_example: Please include all miscellaneous international business expenses in your final monthly report to the accounting department.
new_example: Please include all miscellaneous business expenses in your report today.
new_translation: Vui lòng bao gồm tất cả các chi phí kinh doanh hỗn hợp hôm nay.

old_example: The manager issued a statement to resolve the common misconception regarding the company's international financial health.
new_example: The manager issued a statement to resolve the common misconception today.
new_translation: Quản lý đã đưa ra tuyên bố để giải tỏa quan niệm sai lầm hôm nay.

old_example: The traveler felt miserable after his international flight was canceled due to severe weather conditions and technical issues.
new_example: The traveler felt miserable after his international flight was canceled today.
new_translation: Người du hành thấy khổ sở sau khi chuyến bay quốc tế bị hủy.

old_example: The administrative assistant realized that she had accidentally misfiled the important medical documents in the wrong patient folder.
new_example: The assistant realized she had misfiled the important documents today.
new_translation: Trợ lý nhận ra cô đã cất nhầm các tài liệu quan trọng hôm nay.
